title: vinca minor subsp. major
intro: Vinca minor subsp. major, also known as Big Periwinkle or Greater Periwinkle, is a flowering plant species in the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Vinca minor subsp. major include its potential to treat various conditions, such as high blood pressure, respiratory issues, and certain types of cancer, due to its antioxidant and cytotoxic properties. Herbal preparations of Vinca minor subsp. major include infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
